hypothesis: Lowering VIX BULL hard cap from 22 to 18. CALL entries in VIX 18-22 zone are net losers (elevated VIX bull entries underperform). IS n=4 blocked, delta=+$221. OOS n=1 blocked, delta=+$219.
ratification_authority: Auto-ratify: OOS positive + WF>=0.70 + SW hurt<=1 + anchor OK. J directive 'if its profitable implement it'.
prior_c14_result: Batch 8 (old baseline, 2-week OOS): IS_delta=+$1,253, OOS_delta=+$219, WF=2.846. Sub-window not explicitly logged; C14 closed as 'sole RATIFY=tighter stop'.
wf_verdict: PASS (5.946 >= 0.70). NOTE: inflated by small n_is_blocked=4 (per-trade IS=$55 vs OOS=$219). Direction consistent. Evidence thin.

is_sub_windows.W1_2025H1: -372 HURT (blocked a profitable VIX 18-22 BULL entry in early-2025 regime)

anchor_notes: 4/29, 5/01, 5/04 all delta=$0 — anchor days had VIX<18 after tariff-shock drop, gate doesn't fire.
oos_blocked_trades: 1 trade blocked in May 8-Jun 16 OOS window (pnl=-$219 before block = +$219 after block)
mechanism: Blocks ALL CALL (BULL) entries when VIX >= 18.0 (previously >= 22.0). In VIX 18-22 zone: elevated uncertainty, bull entries statistically lose. Rationale: W3/W4 IS shows VIX 18-22 bull entries are net negative; OOS May 2026 confirms 1 blocked loser.
evidence_quality: THIN — n_is_blocked=4, n_oos_blocked=1. Statistical significance low. WF score inflated by n ratio. Deploy with revert-ready posture.
deployment_scope: SAFE account only (params.json). Aggressive NOT updated — aggressive has VIX<30 hard cap, different baseline, unvalidated for VIX 22-30 blocks.

revert_instructions: set vix_entry_thresholds.bull_hard_cap: 22.0 in params.json and restore heartbeat.md filter 9 to 'VIX<22 (HARD)'
